prompt: Stacked typographic logo on solid black background. Two lines of text, perfectly center-aligned. Top line: 'MM' in very large, ultra-bold white geometric sans-serif letters taking up most of the width. Bottom line: 'AGENCY.' in smaller, thin weight white text with very wide letter-spacing (tracking), creating an elegant contrast between the massive MM and the refined AGENCY below. The period/dot at the end of AGENCY is in electric cyan (#00E3FF). The typeface is clean and modern — no serifs, no decorative elements. The vertical arrangement creates a monument-like presence. No icon, no symbol, no graphic element. Pure typographic hierarchy. Vector quality, razor sharp, flat solid colors, perfectly centered on matte black.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic element, shield, mask, illustration, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, ornamental, serif font, script font, handwritten, rough texture, grunge, noise, blur, low quality, pixelated, realistic photo, photography, human, colorful, rainbow, multiple colors beyond white and cyan
